name: Williamsburg Chicken, as Served at London Town Publik House
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil a 10" X 13" pan.
2. Soften the gelatin in a little cold water or chicken broth. Place over low heat and stir until it dissolves.
3. Cool and stir in lemon juice, salt, pepper, and thyme into the mixture.
4. Mix well with the broth and mayonnaise.
5. Add all other ingredients (except grapes) to the pan and pour into the prepared dish.
6. Place in refrigerator overnight or for several hours until set.
7. Decorate with halved grapes and serve over salad greens.
